title: arctostaphylos tomentosa subsp. hebeclada
intro: Arctostaphylos tomentosa subsp. hebeclada, also known as Island Bearberry or Toiyabe Bearberry, is a plant species in the heath family Ericaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Arctostaphylos tomentosa subsp. hebeclada can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, sore throats, and other respiratory issues.
